creators.affiliation: NASA Goddard Space Flight Center, Greenbelt, MD
creators.name: Spohn, Corey

title: yippy
description: yippy is an open-source Python library for reading, interpreting, and querying coronagraph performance data from Yield Input Packages (YIPs). It provides Fourier-domain PSF interpolation, AYO/EXOSIMS-compatible exports, and a JAX-compatible interface for use in differentiable and GPU-accelerated Habitable Worlds Observatory simulation pipelines.
